name: Kids & Company
message: Kids & Company is a leading provider of high-quality, flexible child care and early education, operating over 150 locations across North America. They offer a range of programs for children aged 6 weeks to 12 years, including infant, toddler, preschool, kindergarten, and school-age care, as well as summer camps and back-up care services. Their unique curriculum emphasizes emergent learning and fosters independence, confidence, and socialization through play and exploration. The company also partners with employers to provide caregiving benefits, addressing work-life conflicts for families.
